title: Equestrian Races
content:
"Equestrian Races" is a term used to refer to all the sentient species native to the planet Equus. Out of all known planets with native sapient life, Equus is highly unique in the sheer variety and number of species to have developed on it. Additionally, the Equestrian Races are the only catalogued species that are able to naturally harness the energy they refer to as "magic" (With the exception of the Tantabus Parasite, but its origins are completely unknown). Most Equestrian Races are quadrupedal and smaller than most other species of the galaxy, though some are larger and/or bipedal.

List of Equestrian Races:

The following is a non-exhaustive list of sapient species found on Equus. Numerous more have been catalogued, but are much smaller in population than the ones listed below.

  • Pony - Colorful equines. Has various subspecies, most notably the Earth Ponies, Pegasi, and Unicorns.
  • Griffon - Mammals with avian characteristics. Typically larger than most other Equestrian Races. 
  • Zebra - Striped equines. Closely resembles the Earth Pony subspecies.
  • Deer - Horned mammals. Shares a surface level resemblance to Earth cervids.
  • Changeling - Shapeshifting insectoids. Split into two subspecies: Chrysalid and Thoraxian.
  • Minotaur - Large bipeds. Noted for their physical strength and rare bipedal stature.
  • Dragon - Fire-breathing Reptiles. The largest of the Equestrian Races, dragons are extremely physically powerful.
  • Hippogriff/Seapony - Shapeshifting Mammals/Aquatics. Able to change forms via magical means.
  • Kirin - Fire-proof mammals. Prone to dangerous bouts of anger.
  • Yak - Large, boreal mammals. Horned and quick to anger and aggression.
  • Buffalo - Large, arid mammals. Smaller horns than yaks, typically mellow but territorial.
  • Yeti - Mid-sized bipeds. Powerful for their size, able to move on two or four legs with ease.
  • Diamond Dog - Subterranean mammal. Bipedal, but only slightly larger than a pony. Excellent diggers.
